Localization.Description: Possible code execution using the CVE-2024-29510 vulnerability. It is a format string vulnerability in Ghostscript versions before 10.03.1 that allows you to bypass the sandbox and execute arbitrary commands. This vulnerability can be used via libraries such as ImageMagick.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} started process {object.process.name} using Ghostscript vulnerability CVE-2024-29510 on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} started process {object.process.name} with a Ghostscript parent process on host {event_src.host}
